travelItinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
travelItinerary.description: The HCM Alignment: Clarity, Purpose, and the 2.0 Version of You
travelItinerary.pageDescription: Most professionals are "successful" but misaligned. We’re bringing Mind, Body, and Career into a single, sharp focus. In this HCM intensive, we tackle the Clarity Gap. We’ll align your physical health (HIIT & Nutrition) with your professional output and personal purpose. Stop choosing between your health and your paycheck. Learn the "learnObytes" method to integrate fitness, financial clarity, and career fulfillment into one cohesive life.
